headline: A Look At Stryker (SYK) Valuation After Recent Share Price Gains And Overvaluation Debate
summary: Why Stryker is on investors’ radar today Stryker (SYK) has drawn fresh investor attention after recent trading left the shares with a 1 day return of 3% and a 7 day return of 4.0%, against broadly mixed healthcare sentiment. Those short term moves sit alongside a month return of 2.7% and a past 3 months return of 1.8%. This has prompted some investors to recheck how the company’s fundamentals line up with its current US$370.50 share price. See our latest analysis for Stryker. Over the past...
